{{Quote|I met with Colonel Jev on Nieuth Four.|Personal addendum by General Airen Cracken to a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Nieuth Four''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Nieuth system/Legends|Nieuth system]], a part of the [[Wyloff sector/Legends|Wyloff sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] was fought, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[operative]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] defector [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Vin Northal/Legends|Vin Northal]] contacted Colonel [[Ilo Jev/Legends|Ilo Jev]], the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the [[Wyloff sector Imperial Intelligence ExComm facility]], who was on leave at the time.<ref name="CRO" />

Through Northal, a meeting was arranged between Jev and Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]. As a result of the meeting, which took place on Nieuth Four, Jev began to provide the Alliance with strategic information from his [[External Communications|ExComm]] facility. Cracken subsequently mentioned the meeting on Nieuth Four in a personal addendum to a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nieuth Four was created by [[David R. Tulo, Jr.]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Nieuth [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Nieuth Four, in grid square L-8.<ref name="TEA" />
